cost_assumptions.claim_boundary: Cost outputs are research diagnostics only and are not profitability, paper/live, broker, production, or capital-allocation evidence.
layer_set: Layer 1 hard transaction cost from reviewed offline descriptors only.
Layer 2 spread crossing from valid point-in-time BBO where bound, with missing or invalid BBO flagged rather than fabricated.
Layer 3 slippage and capacity proxy as sensitivity only, never fill-capacity evidence.
cost_assumptions.missing_bbo_policy: When BBO is unavailable or pending P15, diagnostics must mark the approved missing-BBO fallback and cannot invent spread or depth values.
cost_assumptions.thin_session_penalty_rule: Apply stricter spread, slippage, and capacity proxy treatment after every non-zero profile; overlays never reduce modeled cost or relax capacity proxy caps.
cost_assumptions.zero_cost_boundary: zero_cost is diagnostic-only contrast and cannot support any favorable continuation or survivor basis.

dataset_scope.boundary_contract: This re-lock performed read-only resolution and did not run diagnostics, materialize values, mutate registries, or change promotion state.

source_alpha_spec.summary: Failed-breakout reversal event with fixed boundary and objective failure-deadline rules.

top_level_label_spec_policy.policy: Top-level StudySpec label_spec_id is preserved as the original governance anchor; dataset-scope label pack locks carry current per-year registry label_spec_id values tied to the live lver identities.

dataset_scope.value_free_contract: This StudySpec contains only ids, hashes, metadata, lock counts, sessions, horizons, and governance bounds; no market, feature, label, diagnostic, return, signal, or cost values are embedded.

locked_test_policy.OOS_policy: No locked-test tuning, no repeated OOS selection, and no post-diagnostic variant expansion are allowed.
locked_test_policy.diagnostics_dependency: FUTCORE-P16 through FUTCORE-P20 may consume only this StudySpec plus any FUTCORE-P15 resolved binding; they must not broaden inputs ad hoc.
locked_test_policy.result_boundary: This file contains no diagnostic result and cannot be used as a profitability, paper/live, broker, production, or capital-allocation basis.
locked_test_policy.study_spec_freeze: P14 freezes pack ids, session-horizon matrix, cost profiles, no-lookahead targets, and variant budget before diagnostics are run.

availability_discipline: Every feature input must carry available_ts not later than the decision timestamp.
Every label must be consumed only as a label with label_available_ts after the outcome window and never as a feature.
Running session aggregates may be used only as running values under available_ts; final-session aggregates are available only after session completion.

Cross-instrument inputs require the maximum available_ts across all required legs to be no later than the decision timestamp; missing, late, stale, or out-of-order legs are excluded rather than forward-filled.
split_protocol.diagnostic_focus: Fixed breakout boundaries, failure-deadline timing, volume overlay, and 15m label deferral.
split_protocol.extended_intraday_policy: Extended intraday horizons require stronger sample, overlap, regime, stability, and maintenance-break checks before any later phase may add them.
family_no_lookahead_requirements: Reference levels, compression ranges, breakout boundaries, and sweep levels are fixed before the trigger decision timestamp.
Sweep, close-back-inside, breakout, and failure-deadline rules use completed bars and objective timestamps only.
Volume and activity are overlays only; they cannot create a standalone family or substitute for missing price-action primitives.
No future high, low, session final, or label outcome may define the event boundary.

fragile_diagnostic_horizons.gate: stricter spread, liquidity, timestamp, and cost checks required
stricter spread, liquidity, timestamp, and cost checks required

split_protocol.maintenance_break_policy: No modeled holding period may cross the exchange daily maintenance or trade-date break; flat-before-maintenance is required.

split_protocol.variant_budget_count_rule: The two declared axes create at most four parameter combinations; sessions, horizons, instruments, and cost profiles are fixed reporting slices and must not be multiplied into additional variant-grid choices.

stopping_rules: Stop diagnostics for any row or variant whose feature available_ts is after the decision timestamp.
Stop diagnostics for any horizon whose LabelPack binding remains pending FUTCORE-P15 resolution.
Stop diagnostics for any variant that would exceed the declared variant_budget of four combinations.
Stop diagnostics for any modeled holding interval that crosses the exchange daily maintenance or trade-date break.
Stop diagnostics for any input that requires final-session aggregate intraday use or same-bar outcome information.
Stop diagnostics for any accepted AlphaSpec primitive whose required P15 binding remains unresolved.
